title: Bug fix batch 1: 6 high-priority narrow repairs
consumer_purpose: fix confirmed defects that can corrupt data, break startup, leak secrets, or cause silent failures
claim_atoms: Each fix is narrow (< 15 lines changed)
content:
## Fix 1: Crash lock never deleted (H01)
**File:** packages/desktop/src/main/index.ts
**Root cause:** .crash_lock is written at line 294 but never deleted on clean exit.
**Fix:** Add `unlinkSync(crashLock)` in the `will-quit` handler before or after `killSidecar()`.
**Risk:** None — unlink of a non-existent file throws, so wrap in try/catch.
**Tests:** Manual — restart after crash should not enter safe mode.

## Fix 2: Foreign keys not enabled in production SQLite (H22, H25)
**File:** packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts (bun:sqlite path) and packages/opencode/src/storage/db.pg.ts (PGlite path)
**Root cause:** Neither database backend runs PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON.
**Fix:** Add `PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON` right after database open in both backends.
**Risk:** LOW — foreign key enforcement is standard SQL behavior. If any existing code relies on orphans surviving a parent delete, that code will see cascade deletes. This is correct behavior per schema definitions.
**Tests:** Verify cascade deletes work on session delete.

## Fix 3: FileLock unguarded lazy-init race (C01, M14)
**File:** packages/opencode/src/tool/file-lock.ts
**Root cause:** Two concurrent `lock()` calls can both see `locks.get(key) === undefined` and both create semaphores.
**Fix:** Use a single `Ref<Map<string, Semaphore.Semaphore>>` with `Ref.modify` for atomic check-then-init.
**Risk:** LOW — same API, same semantics, just atomic. Fixes the memory leak too (no change needed separately).
**Tests:** Parallel file write test with concurrent tool calls.

## Fix 4: JSON.parse crash in comment-plan.ts (M15)
**File:** packages/opencode/src/tool/comment-plan.ts
**Root cause:** No error handling around JSON.parse of file content.
**Fix:** Wrap JSON.parse in try/catch, return ToolResult with error message on parse failure.
**Risk:** LOW — reduces crash surface.
**Tests:** Unit test with malformed plan file.

## Fix 5: Cache inflight entry removed before cache written (C02)
**File:** packages/opencode/src/tool/cache.ts
**Root cause:** Effect.ensuring cleanup removes inflight entry before the cache Ref.update completes.
**Fix:** Move inflight cleanup from Effect.ensuring to after the cache write, OR use a single atomic Ref.modify for both.
**Risk:** LOW — ordering change within the same fiber.
**Tests:** Existing cache dedup test should still pass.

## Fix 6: Plugin tool impersonation guard (H30)
**File:** packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts
**Root cause:** File-based custom tools in {tool,tools}/*.{js,ts} have no namespace prefix, so a file named `read.ts` registers tool ID `read` — colliding with built-in.
**Fix:** In the `fromPlugin` path for file tools, reject tool IDs that match built-in tool names by checking against a built-in ID set.
**Risk:** LOW — prevents an existing gap. Agents that accidentally named custom tools after built-ins will get a clear error.
**Tests:** Verify registration of colliding tool ID fails with clear message.
